languages.text: At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} suffers +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} more exploits. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploits, one of those enemies is chosen at random.
languages.original_text: At the start of the Operative's turn, the enemy with the largest number of exploits receves an additional exploit stack. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of {uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} exploit stacks, one of those enemies is chosen at random

traits.locale_text: At the start of the Adept's turn, one enemy with the largest number of clues is affected by an additional clue. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of clue stacks, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} suffers +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} more exploits. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploits, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} suffers +{uip|INTB/2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} more exploits. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploits, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} receives an additional exploit stack. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploit stacks, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

languages.text: В начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}оперативника{/g} противник с самым большим числом уязвимостей получает дополнительные {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}уязвимости{/g} ({uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c}). Если таких противников двое или больше, то выбор происходит случайным образом.
languages.original_text: At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} suffers +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} more exploits. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploits, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

traits.locale_text: В начале хода адепта противник с самым большим числом уязвимостей получает еще 1 уязвимость. Если таких противников двое или больше, то выбор происходит случайным образом.
В начале хода адепта противник с самым большим числом уязвимостей получает еще 1 уязвимость. Если таких противников двое или больше, то выбор происходит случайным образом.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}特工{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}研究{/g}效果层数最多的敌人额外受到{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c}层研究效果。如果多名敌人的层数相同，则随机选择其中一名敌人。
languages.original_text: At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} suffers +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} more exploits. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploits, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}特工{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}研究{/g}效果层数最多的敌人额外受到{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c}层研究效果。如果多名敌人的层数相同，则随机选择其中一名敌人。

languages.text: Al principio del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}agente{/g}, el enemigo con mayor número de {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}vulnerabilidades{/g} sufre +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} acumulaciones extra de vulnerabilidad. Si hay dos enemigos o más empatados en vulnerabilidades, se elige a uno de ellos al azar.
languages.original_text: At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} suffers +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} more exploits. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploits, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

traits.locale_text: Al principio del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}agente{/g}, el enemigo con mayor número de {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}vulnerabilidades{/g} sufre +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} acumulaciones extra de vulnerabilidad. Si hay dos enemigos o más empatados en vulnerabilidades, se elige a uno de ellos al azar.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}オペレーター{/g}の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時、エクスプロイトの数が最も多い敵に追加で{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}エクスプロイト{/g}がスタックされる。エクスプロイトの最大スタック数が同数の敵が2体以上いる場合、そのうちの1体がランダムに選ばれる。
languages.original_text: At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the enemy with the largest number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} receives an additional exploit stack. If two or more enemies are tied for the largest number of exploit stacks, one of those enemies is chosen at random.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}オペレーター{/g}の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時、エクスプロイトの数が最も多い敵に追加で{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}エクスプロイト{/g}がスタックされる。エクスプロイトの最大スタック数が同数の敵が2体以上いる場合、そのうちの1体がランダムに選ばれる。

languages.text: Zu Beginn des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Agenten{/g} erhält der Feind mit der größten Anzahl {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}Ausnutzen{/g}-Stapel +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} Ausnutzen-Stapel. Haben zwei oder mehr Gegner die meisten Ausnutzen-Stapel, wird einer dieser Gegner nach dem Zufallsprinzip ausgewählt.

languages.text: Au début du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} de l'{g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}agent{/g}, l'ennemi avec le plus de cumuls de {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}Vulnérabilité{/g} subit +{uip|INTB2|ec4f6ac63df24585843693f01dc69b1c} cumuls supplémentaires. Si deux ennemis ou plus sont à égalité en première place, l'un d'entre eux est choisi de façon aléatoire.
